name: Karan Singh
summary: Karan discusses how his NCC C-certificate experience helped him in the GTO tasks (Command Task and HGT) and built his leadership skills.
data: NCC Special Entry has no written exam; you get called directly for SSB based on your graduation marks and NCC C-certificate. My SSB was at Bangalore. Because of my NCC background, I was well-versed in commands, basic drills, and field-craft, which gave me an edge during GTO. The GTO tasks check your social adaptability. Help those who are stuck, and lead when your team is clueless. In the Command Task, my commanders were cooperative because I briefed them clearly. Be proud of your uniform, maintain integrity, and keep working hard.
